mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of periods following a rate cut, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns exceed +1% in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE growth is below 0.3pp.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and business demand expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production reflects weakening manufacturing output and supply-side contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in >65% of declining INDPRO months, or the signal reverses direction during easing periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >55% of high-inflation months, or the signal fails to predict returns when CPIAUCSL growth is between 0.2% and 0.4%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirm robust labor market absorption and wage growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative returns in >50% of instances, or the interaction effect vanishes when PAYEMS growth falls below 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth directly increases corporate earnings expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of quarters with positive GDPC1 growth, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A strong month-over-month expansion in industrial production signals robust supply-side capacity utilization and manufacturing demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >55% of triggered months, or the signal loses predictive power when INDPRO growth is between 0.1% and 0.3%.
